rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0020
rows.name:
Eh? Me?
Yeah, I'm fine, perfectly fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0030
rows.name:
I had a flare,
so I sent it up and was waiting for rescue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0040
rows.name:
My precious Doll flew off somewhere,
so I was just a little bit troubled.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0050
rows.name:
If I knew this was going to happen, I probably should have
installed an auto-return mode.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0060
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Wait, this is no time to be talking about this.
It's meaningless if we can't get back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0070
rows.name:
Let's win properly
and all return together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0080
rows.name:
Ah, but is it okay if I at least
record our battle data?[ST:wait ]
